_comment: Sample ability set themed on real King's Call mechanics (Regeneration, Armored, Rage, Inspire, Sanctuary, Cavalry Charge, Blessing, Frenzy). Engine resolves only the effect types listed in cardbot/engine/ability.py: heal_self, increase_max_hp_self, gain_damage_bonus_self, add_modifier_self, heal_lane_ally. Game abilities that don't fit (Vigilance, Flying, multi-target AOEs) are not modeled here. The full ability table (552 entries) is generated to analysis/kingscall_data_pack/raw/Skill.json by cardbot.tools.extract_kingscall_data.

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.description: Heal 2 HP at the start of your turn (Ogre / Undead specialty).

abilities.name: Armored
abilities.description: Gain +2 max HP when summoned; mirrors the Armored damage-reduction trait on tank creatures.

abilities.name: Rage
abilities.description: Gain +2 damage after each hit (Ogre / Beast / Goblin specialty).

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.description: Gain +3 damage after each hit; faster build-up than Rage.

abilities.name: Cavalry Charge
abilities.description: Gain +2 attack on summon, modeling the Human Cavalry +2 movement opening burst.

abilities.name: Inspire
abilities.description: On summon, gain a persistent +1 attack modifier (Warrior aura flavor).

abilities.name: Sanctuary
abilities.description: On summon, gain +3 max HP for 3 turns (Priest defensive blessing).

abilities.name: Blessing
abilities.description: Heal the ally in this lane for 2 HP at the start of your turn (Priest support).
